SEARCH
Module it.polimi.ingsw.am37
Package it.polimi.ingsw.am37.model.sides

Class Corner

java.lang.Object
it.polimi.ingsw.am37.model.sides.Corner
public class Corner extends Object
The Corner class represents the concept of a generic corner of one of the sides of the card.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Corner(boolean isVisible, Resource resource)
    The Corner(isVisible, resource) constructor assigns the values given as parameters to the isVisible and resource attributes, and it sets the linkedSide to null.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Side
    getLinkedSide()
    The getLinkedSide() method returns the Side object that covers this Corner.
    Resource
    getResource()
    The getResource() method returns the Resource object contained in this Corner.
    boolean
    getVisibility()
    The getVisibility() method returns the value of the isVisible attribute.
    void
    setLinkedSide(Side linkedSide)
    The setLinkedSide(linkedSide) method assigns the linkedSide attribute to the Side object given as parameter.
    String
    toString()
    the toString method is used for debugging and prints the status of the corner.

    Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, wait, wait, wait

  • Constructor Details

    • Corner

      public Corner(boolean isVisible, Resource resource)
      The Corner(isVisible, resource) constructor assigns the values given as parameters to the isVisible and resource attributes, and it sets the linkedSide to null.
      Parameters:
      isVisible - A boolean that contains information about the visibility of the Corner. It is true if the corner is visible, false if it is not visible.
      resource - A Resource object that represents the resource present in this Corner.

  • Method Details

    • getVisibility

      public boolean getVisibility()
      The getVisibility() method returns the value of the isVisible attribute.
      Returns:
      true if the Corner is visible, false if the Corner is not visible.

    • getResource

      public Resource getResource()
      The getResource() method returns the Resource object contained in this Corner.
      Returns:
      A Resource object that represents the resource present in this Corner.

    • getLinkedSide

      public Side getLinkedSide()
      The getLinkedSide() method returns the Side object that covers this Corner. It returns null if no Side is currently covering the Corner.
      Returns:
      A reference to the Side object that covers this Corner.

    • setLinkedSide

      public void setLinkedSide(Side linkedSide)
      The setLinkedSide(linkedSide) method assigns the linkedSide attribute to the Side object given as parameter.
      Parameters:
      linkedSide - A reference to the Side object that covers this Corner.

    • toString

      public String toString()
      the toString method is used for debugging and prints the status of the corner.
      Overrides:
      toString in class Object
      Returns:
      a string with all the infos about the corner.
